metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5525
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Angiomotin colocalizes with PSD-95 (Fig. 1F); it is present in the highly enriched PSD fraction (Fig. 1E) and coIPs with PSD-95 and MUPP1/MPDZ (Fig 1G-I); Fig. 2 provides evidence that over-expressed YFP-tagged AMOT co-distributes with the presynaptic marker Bassoon and the excitatory postsynaptic markers PSD-95 and Mupp1, but not with the inhibitory postsynaptic marker Gephyrin.. Experimental description: "Dissociated cultures of primary hippocampal neurons were prepared from E18 Sprague-Dawley rat embryos..." (p. 726)
A commercial antibody (C-18) was tested for its specificity to detect AMOT, but not the related gene products AMOT-L1 or AMOT-L2 in transfected HEK293T cells (Fig. 1 A,B).
Another antibody (#2095) generated against the N-Terminus recognizes specifically AMOT-130 and not the AMOT-80 splice isoform.
Reviewed UniProt-Accs are only available for Human (Q4VCS5) and Mouse (Q8VHG2).
